name: Research Investigation
description: Collaborative research — parallel investigation, deduplication, synthesis into structured documents

responseRules: Distinguish fact from inference — cite sources when possible
Flag uncertainty levels: confirmed, likely, speculative
Contradictions must be called out immediately, not smoothed over
Stay in your investigation lane — don't duplicate other researchers' work
Synthesis requires judgment, not just concatenation
decisionCriteria: Respond when you have relevant findings or can challenge an assumption
The synthesizer has priority during the synthesis phase
Question methodology as well as conclusions
feedbackLoopRules: All claims must have supporting evidence
Contradictions between investigators must be explicitly resolved, not ignored
Missing coverage should be flagged, not silently accepted

roles.description: Decomposes the research question and synthesizes final findings
Investigates assigned aspects of the research question in depth
Verifies claims, checks sources, catches contradictions
